questions.stem: Which of the following assessments is primarily designed to evaluate non-verbal intelligence?
questions.explanation: The Leiter International Performance Scale is specifically designed to assess non-verbal intelligence, making it suitable for individuals with communication difficulties. The other assessments, such as the Wechsler and Stanford-Binet, include verbal components.
questions.kn_explanation: This KN code applies as it relates to the assessment of cognitive abilities, specifically non-verbal intelligence.
questions.quality_comment: The question is clear and directly assesses knowledge of non-verbal intelligence assessments.
questions.suggestedParagraph: ## Individual Tests: Matching the Right Tool to the Right Person
questions.lessonExcerpt: The Leiter-3 is the Swiss Army knife of nonverbal cognitive assessment.
